name: Tim Minchin
bio: Tim Minchin is a British-Australian musical comedian, composer, actor and songwriter known for satirical piano-driven songs touching on religion, science and social issues. He broke through in the mid-2000s with his show Darkside, winning the Perrier Best Newcomer award at the Edinburgh Festival Fringe in 2005, and went on to perform comedy internationally. He later composed the music and lyrics for the award-winning stage musicals Matilda the Musical and Groundhog Day.

timeline.ev: Wins Perrier Best Newcomer at Edinburgh Fringe
Performs with orchestras including the Heritage Orchestra
Matilda the Musical premieres in the West End
Releases debut studio album Apart Together

accolades: Perrier Award Best Newcomer, Edinburgh Fringe 2005
Composer of Olivier and Tony Award-winning Matilda the Musical
Appointed Member of the Order of Australia (AM)

specials.t: Tim Minchin and the Heritage Orchestra
